description: A family booking two rooms requests that they be connecting rooms.

nodes.task_description: Check availability for a pair of connecting rooms for the requested dates.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent finds an available connecting pair of rooms.

nodes.task_description: Book both rooms and use the system to link the two reservations together.

expected_outcome.expected: Two reservations are created and linked.

nodes.task_description: Add a note to the booking confirming the connecting room request, ensuring they are not separated.

expected_outcome.expected: A clear note is added to prevent accidental room changes.
